mapper.select: select rollout_id from public_agent_config_rollouts where status in ('PREPARING', 'DRAINING') order by created_at desc limit 1

select r.rollout_id from public_agent_config_rollouts r where r.status in ('PREPARING', 'DRAINING') and (r.status = 'PREPARING' or ( exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_servers s where s.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and s.status not in ('SYNCED', 'DECOMMISSIONED') ) or exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t where t.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and t.status not in ('DISPOSED', 'ABANDONED') and (t.user_id = #{userId} or t.user_id is null) ) )) order by r.created_at desc limit 1

select rollout_id, branch, commit_hash, previous_commit_hash, initiated_by_user_id, initiated_linux_server_id, trace_id, created_at from public_agent_config_rollouts where status = 'PREPARING' and initiated_linux_server_id = #{linuxServerId} order by created_at limit 1
select linux_server_id from public_agent_config_rollout_memberships where status = 'ACTIVE' order by linux_server_id

select r.rollout_id, r.branch, r.commit_hash, r.initiated_by_user_id, r.trace_id, s.retry_count, s.lease_until, s.lease_token from public_agent_config_rollouts r join public_agent_config_rollout_servers s on s.rollout_id = r.rollout_id where r.status = 'DRAINING' and s.linux_server_id = #{linuxServerId} and ((s.status in ('PENDING', 'RETRY_WAIT') and s.next_retry_at <= #{now}) or (s.status = 'PROCESSING' and s.lease_until <= #{now})) order by r.created_at for update skip locked limit #{limit}

select distinct w.root_path from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t join execution_nodes n on n.base_url = t.base_url join agent_session_bindings b on b.execution_node_id = n.execution_node_id and b.agent_id = 'opencode' join sessions s on s.session_id = b.session_id join workspaces w on w.workspace_id = s.workspace_id where t.target_id = #{targetId} order by w.root_path
mapper.update: update public_agent_config_rollouts set status = 'DRAINING', commit_hash = #{commitHash}, updated_at = #{now}, failure_reason = null where rollout_id = #{rolloutId} and status = 'PREPARING'
mapper.insert: insert into public_agent_config_rollout_memberships( linux_server_id, status, registered_at, decommissioned_at, updated_at ) values (#{linuxServerId}, 'ACTIVE', #{now}, null, #{now}) on conflict (linux_server_id) do update set status = 'ACTIVE', decommissioned_at = null, updated_at = excluded.updated_at

insert into public_agent_config_rollout_servers( rollout_id, linux_server_id, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, created_at, updated_at ) values (#{rolloutId}, #{linuxServerId}, 'PENDING', 0, #{now}, #{now}, #{now}) on conflict (rollout_id, linux_server_id) do nothing
mapper.select: select t.target_id, t.rollout_id, t.user_id, t.linux_server_id, t.container_id, t.port, t.process_pid, t.process_started_at, t.base_url, t.retry_count, t.lease_until, t.lease_token, r.trace_id from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t join public_agent_config_rollouts r on r.rollout_id = t.rollout_id and r.status = 'DRAINING' where not exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_servers s where s.rollout_id = t.rollout_id and s.status not in ('SYNCED', 'DECOMMISSIONED') ) and t.linux_server_id = #{linuxServerId} and ((t.status = 'RETRY_WAIT' and t.next_retry_at <= #{now}) or (t.status = 'PROCESSING' and t.lease_until <= #{now})) order by t.next_retry_at, t.created_at for update skip locked limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update public_agent_config_rollouts r set status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now} where r.status = 'DRAINING' and not exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_servers s where s.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and s.status not in ('SYNCED', 'DECOMMISSIONED') ) and not exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t where t.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and t.status not in ('DISPOSED', 'ABANDONED') )
